title: Tribute to Ken Leghorn: A Champion of Conservation and Community
summary: Dear Friends, Ken Leghorn ©Tom Bol, 2004 We are deeply saddened to share that our friend and Trustee Emeritus, Ken Leghorn, passed away on April 11, 2017 after a seven-month battle with pancreatic cancer. Our heartfelt condolences go out to his family and many friends around the country. (Ken’s full obituary can be found here .) If there ever wa...

title: Internship with sand & sun on the side
summary: Randy Adams is the descendant of Chugach shareholders, and he is currently being funded by the Chugach Heritage Foundation (CHF) as he works toward a Master in Project Management. He is also the recipient of the CHF Barney Uhart Scholarship, which provide additional funding and an internship with Ch...
